videos.description: You can increase your chances of success on the IELTS by preparing and practising in advance. Today, we will look specifically at the IELTS General Writing Task 2, which involves presenting two sides of an argument and giving your opinion. videos.title: 001.C1C2.READINGIELTS. LOST AND FOUND
videos.description:
Reading Comprehension

A. Read the story again. Are these statements TRUE or FALSE?

1, Saroo and his brother both had jobs cleaning the trains.
2, Saroo fell asleep at the station in Calcutta.
3, He lived on the streets and continued to work on the trains.
4, He was given food and shelter by a man.
